title: Nojiko Reveals Nami’s Past
scene: On pages 17–19, Nojiko’s account of the past reveals how Nami, Bellemere, and Cocoyasi Village were damaged by Arlong’s arrival. Nojiko starts revealing the past that shaped Nami, Bellemere, and the village.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Then... that rumour about the fishman pirate crew in Grand Line Splitting off... must've been true...!

dialogue.speaker: Child Nami
dialogue.text: Nami! Nojiko! It's too dangerous for you to stay here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Go hide in the forest behind here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But Bellie- here's waiting for us at home...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Greet- Ings, my beloved pathetic humans!

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: This village... nay, this entire island shall be under my control!

summary: This part deepens Nami’s backstory, showing how family, money, and survival became tied to Arlong’s control over the village.
